1) Get Defensive, put words in his mouth that he's trying to guilt you.

2) Get hurt. Ask him why he's saying all this stuff to make you feel bad about your career

3) remind him that he knew what he was signing up for marrying you.

4) Or. Ya know. You can be attentive and listen to him. Reassure him, All that sweet stuff.
